title: Better Exploration
description: This modpack adds a lot to better your adventure to Minecraft. It also adds a new breath into Minecraft to make it not boring.
body:
![ICON](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2d3e27410313819b1f18d599a94a2e2163c80304.png)

### BETTER EXPLORATION
_A modpack that is made to give Minecraft the revival it needs._
_____________________________________________________________________________________________________

## **FEATURES**
1. New Terrain
2. Multiplayer through Essentials
3. Better Dimensions
4. Better Structures
5. Bosses and new Mobs
6. Quality of Life
7. Voice chat
8. Optimization 
_____________________________________________________________________________________________________
